cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(ComplexGramCustomOp LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# This repository mirrors the user-extension files generated by msOpGen:
#   op_host/complex_gram.cpp
#   op_kernel/complex_gram.cpp
#   op_kernel/complex_gram_tiling.h
# On a real Ascend environment, use msOpGen's generated top-level CMake/toolchain.

option(COMPLEX_GRAM_BUILD_HOST_TILING "Build standalone host tiling calculator" ON)

if(COMPLEX_GRAM_BUILD_HOST_TILING)
  add_executable(complex_gram_tiling op_host/complex_gram.cpp)
  target_compile_definitions(complex_gram_tiling PRIVATE COMPLEX_GRAM_HOST_STANDALONE)
endif()
